hypothesis: If the o4-mini model is prompted with one-shot prompts using the most complex in-context example, then PROV-DM-compliant extraction of synthesis procedures from scientific papers will achieve higher precision, recall, and F1-score at both the structural level (nodes/edges) and the parametric level (node attributes), as well as a higher collection rate, than zero-shot prompting or prompting with less complex in-context examples.
